criteria.description: Live demonstration: a hostile ../../ soul is rejected under restriction and still resolved without it; an https:// reference yields the documented §7.2 message.
criteria.evidence: WP01 live verifier executed the built CLI: escape attempt against ../../../../etc/hostname rejected with 'escapes the restricted base directory' (exit 1) under --restrict-refs; without the flag the shipped behavior is preserved (the file was actually read, proving RISK-1 was real); https:// reference produced the §7.2 'URI reference schemes are not supported' message in both modes; a:b.md colon-path edge case still resolves as a path.

criteria.description: Full suite green including new guards; shipped CTS suite 28/28 with byte-identical canonical outputs (NFR-001).
criteria.evidence: 567 tests / 30 files green on the integrated mission branch. NFR-001 proven live: resolve --output-format canonical-json sha256-identical between pre-change main and the hardened build for minimal/valid (a1c93803…) and composition/local_wins (8647b6fd…); cts run 28/28 with and without bare --restrict-refs.
criteria.verified_by: claude (workflow wf_e5b8a84b-038 verifiers: WP01, WP02; integration run on mission branch)

criteria.description: Each invariant guard demonstrably constrains: planting a violation makes the matching guard fail.
criteria.evidence: WP02 verifier ran all three trip-tests in a scratch copy: planted nvapi-shaped secret tripped NI-001 (failure output did NOT print the planted string), core→adapters import tripped NI-002, stray fetch( in a test tripped NI-003. Scratch discarded; guards run in ~30 ms (NFR-002 <2 s).

criteria.description: README 'Reference resolution' section verified against the built CLI's help and actual error messages.
criteria.evidence: WP03 verifier rebuilt the CLI and diffed every quoted artifact in the README section against live output: --restrict-refs help line, the §7.2 URI error, and the escape error all reproduced verbatim; §7.2 cited explicitly; trust-model paragraph present; adjacent README sections unchanged and accurate.

negative_invariants.description: No new runtime dependencies introduced (spec NFR-003).
negative_invariants.evidence: Empty diff — dependency set unchanged (ajv, commander, yaml).

negative_invariants.description: Parent-mission locked behavior untouched: shipped CTS fixtures, expected.json files, and suite gate unmodified (charter directive 4).
negative_invariants.verification_command: git diff main..HEAD --stat -- cts/ tests/cts/ souls/ behave/ src/adapters/
negative_invariants.evidence: Empty diff — only pipeline.ts, cts/runner.ts, cli/index.ts, two existing test files, the new invariants test, and README changed.

negative_invariants.description: The three permanent invariant guards (secrets, core/adapter boundary, fetch isolation) pass on the integrated tree.
negative_invariants.evidence: All guards green in the 567-test integrated run on the mission branch.
